title: Corruption Robust Offline Reinforcement Learning with Human Feedback
abstract: This paper presents the first work that provides provable corruption robust offline RLHF methods. The authors design corruption robust RLHF through reduction to corruption robust offline RL problem, addressing challenges in real-world deployment of RLHF such as adversarial corruption and inherent noise in preference data.

methodology.approach: Reduction to corruption robust offline RL

contributions: First provable corruption robust offline RLHF methods
Addressing adversarial corruption and noise in preference data
Improved sample efficiency and safety compared to online RL approaches
related_work: RLHF: [CL+17, Zie+19, SO+20, OW+22, BJ+22, SDB23]
